claim_text: Phosphorus is required during early wheat growth stages; early P deprivation reduces tiller production and head development even if P is supplied later.

value.raw_value_text: In wheat P requirement during early stages of growth is vital for determining the final yield. Even though sufficient P supplied thereafter, P deprivation during the early developing stages produces significant reductions in tiller production and head development [20, 21].
value.text_value: Phosphorus is required during early wheat growth stages; early P deprivation reduces tiller production and head development even if P is supplied later.

provenance.evidence_text: In wheat P requirement during early stages of growth is vital for determining the final yield. Even though sufficient P supplied thereafter, P deprivation during the early developing stages produces significant reductions in tiller production and head development [20, 21].
